title: ast.symbol_extract request
description: Locate a named symbol in `source` and return its full text plus a 1-based, inclusive line range.

language.description: Canonical language name, e.g. "rust", "swift", "python". Aliases like `ts`, `py`, `c++` are accepted.

symbol_name.description: Symbol to locate. Optionally prefixed with a single container, e.g. `Greeter.greet`.
